texto: Her mother said, Every morning I go up on the roof at six o'clock and pray for twenty minutes. It keeps me from coming apart. Her mother said, Coming apart, coming apart--it's just a crazy thing I feel.
explicacao: Citação de Dylan Landis sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Her mother said, Every morning I go up on the roof at six o'clock and pray for twenty minutes. It…” articula reflexao, prayer, coming em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.
